zh.Manor of Much, Stanbridge, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯坦別利其
zh.Bradfield Heath, Essex, England, United: 英國英格蘭艾可布拉德費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ilam於1457年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，她的父親Thomas Ilam, Mercer27歲，母親Jane Verdun14歲。她於1469年1月10日與John Shaa在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年之後在英國英格蘭艾可布拉德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ilam于1457年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas Ilam, Mercer27岁，母亲Jane Verdun14岁。她于1469年1月10日与John Shaa在英国英格兰米德萊可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年之后在英国英格兰艾可布拉德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ilam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Dovid, Gerson, Hersh, Isadore, Meyer, Moshe, Shira, Shmuel.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): artificial name from Yiddish flam ‘flame’.

variants.name: Flom
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Birgit, Jalmer, Nels, Selmer, Sig.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads named Flom or Flåm, from Old Norse flá ‘terrace, shelf’, referring to a feature of a hillside. Compare Flam .

variants.name: Flamm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Chani, Ephraim, Yossi.

South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a craftsman who worked with fire, from Middle High German vlam(me) ‘flame’, for example a blacksmith. As a Jewish name, it is mainly artificial. Compare Flam .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ilam was born in 1457, in London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Ilam, Mercer, was 27 and her mother, Jane Verdun, was 14. She married John Shaa on 10 January 1469, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1505, in Bradfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ilam est née en 1457, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Ilam, Mercer, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jane Verdun, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé John Shaa le 10 janvier 1469, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1505, à Bradfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Ilam 1457 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Ilam, Mercer 27 und ihre Mutter Jane Verdun 14. Sie hat am 10. Januar 1469 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom John Shaa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1505 in Bradfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ilam è nata il nel 1457 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Ilam, Mercer, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Jane Verdun, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato John Shaa il 10 gennaio 1469, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1505, nel Bradfield, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ilam(이)가 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Ilam, Mercer(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Verdun(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1469년 1월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 John Shaa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브래드필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ilam nasceu em 1457, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Ilam, Mercer, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jane Verdun, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shaa em 10 de janeiro de 1469, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1505, em Bradfield, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ilam родилась в 1457 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Ilam, Mercer было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Verdun, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shaa 10 января 1469 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1505 г. в местности брадфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Ilam nació en 1457, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Ilam, Mercer, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jane Verdun, tenía 14 años. Se casó con John Shaa el 10 de enero de 1469, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1505, en Bradfield, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
